ModMetaData.name: Luxandra Lust
ModMetaData.author: Worldie
ModMetaData.description: A RimJobWorld based narrator. Every time a Major threat would fire, if your colony has been regularly been having sex, the raid will be replaced with a sex-related event. Adds: - two new raid types: horny tribals (preferring Fantasy Races if detected) and rapists (if Ugly bastards is loaded) - horny pulse event: your colonists will be way hornier than usual - rapist pulse event: one or more of your colonists will not take no for an answer
